Rooted across countries, built across disciplines.

My work sits between economics, finance, and software. I use code to make financial data clearer, research to test assumptions, and leadership experience to turn analysis into decisions.

Research Model

Model Logic

01

Input Variables

R&D intensity, firm size, profitability, and sector classification.

→
02

OLS Regression

Tested whether R&D investment predicts annual stock returns.

→
03

Result

R² ≈ 0.01 with no statistically significant R&D premium.

→
04

Interpretation

Findings point toward market efficiency and omitted-variable limits.
